'''jawuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygmy|pygmy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygmy|pygmy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jawuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || jæwiyith || jæwiyij || jæwiyish || jæwiyi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || jawuwuyuth || jawuwuyuj || jawuwuyush || jawuwuyu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || jawuyuth || jawuyuj || jawuyush || jawuyu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || jawufyufth || jawufyufj || jawufyufsh || jawufyuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || jawuyuthu || jawuyuju || jawuyushu || jawuyuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || jawuyuth || jawuyuj || jawuyush || jawuyu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || jawuyuthul || jawuyujul || jawuyushul || jawuyukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || jawuyuuthuthu || jawuyuujuju || jawuyuushushu || jawuyuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || jawuyuthun || jawuyujun || jawuyushun || jawuyukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || jawuyuthuoro || jawuyujuoro || jawuyushuoro || jawuyukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
